Morgana, since you said it could be anything for this big-headed one, what if we broke up and just stayed friends? I think that 's a terrible idea, but the big-headed one from Brazil ... and it 's really rare ... Ah, Last time I met Enaldinho, I made a bad impression. But since his channel shows he buys lots of stuff from the Dark Web, I had an idea to make him like me. Enaldinho, I need to show you something. big-headed one from Brazil So sorry. Oh, man, I ca n't believe this. Right when I was almost able to break up with Morgana. I 'd rather date Enaldinho than be with the big-headed one from Brazil. And Since I lost my big-headed one in Brazil, what do you want to talk about? So, Enaldinho, last time we saw each other, I did n't make a good impression, so I 'm here this time to make it up to you. Yeah. really. Last time, he broke into my house. Enaldinho, but it 's different this time. I 've got a great video idea. Take a look at this machine I found. Is this a weird claw machine from the Dark Web? Yes, that is exactly it. This machine actually looks different and really cool. But to be honest, I do n't know if we should keep buying from the Dark Web. How do you know? Enaldinho, this machine is from the Dark Web. Obviously, it 's a great idea. Yeah, you guys are actually convincing me. Since Bruno threw away my little big-headed Brazil figure, there 's no way to trade it now. So, let 's buy this machine then. There are several options here, but they 're really expensive. Wow, I found this one. It looks like it 's good. It 's a prototype that has n't been 100 % developed yet. But it 's what we can afford. Bruno, you tossed my Brazil hair but you 'll still buy us that dark web machine, the cheapest one? Obviously, man, it 's what I can afford to pay for. You 're kidding, seriously, I can ... Ah, it must be what the guys bought. I 'll call them to sign Right here. No, not me, I am in a really big hurry please sign, I 'm already on my way out. Alright then, here it is for you. There are some pretty terrifying monsters as decoration. And from what I 'm seeing, the prizes are pretty bizarre, like doll heads. bizarre. Oh, Enaldinho, I loved the prizes. Let 's turn this machine on right away. Careful, check if it 's in the ... It 's two hundred twenty volts. Enaldinho, it turned on. Look, I want to test it first. There 's a bat in there. I want to catch that bat. It 's not working, Enaldinho. Look, Morgana, maybe it 's not working because you need a token. Was this display meant to have a QR code? Ah, Enaldinho, it 's the instruction manual. That makes sense, that 's probably why it 's not working. Let me scan this thing. Well, guys, I was loading the QR Code and apparently it loaded a video. Let 's go ahead and click right here to see what it actually is. Honestly, Guilherme, I really did n't understand a single word of anything she just said to us right now. This translator pen translates any language into ours. Now I 'm transcribing everything that woman is saying. Wow, it really looks like a crunchy, spicy cracker. I 'm really curious and wonder if it 's actually any good? It looks like dog food. Apparently, the food that comes out of this machine is n't the best. But I can see that there are some balls with different things inside, not just food. Let me try to get one of those, then. It 's actually good to see if I 'm any good at this game, too. I 'm curious to see what 's going to come inside this ball. It looks like there 's something wrapped in plastic. Look, I do n't know if it was put there to ... protect it, but it just seems to be a mini camera. Hey, Enaldinho, you finally got a good prize. I grabbed the computer here and now, man, I finally got a good prize from our machine. Apparently, there 's only one video file on this camera. Let me hit play to check the video quality. Apparently, there 's nothing good about the prize from this Dark Web machine. Getting this camera for myself was just more proof that buying this machine was a bad idea. At least one person liked it. But I have no desire to get any more prizes from this machine, and if you want, you can have them all. Yeah, I do n't want them either. Oh, I want the doll collection, hold on. Well, since the guys do n't want to play with the machine anymore, I 'm dying to finish this collection of doll heads. And since Naldinho likes to collect things ... Okay, you spent almost the whole day grabbing those dolls, but I 'm really impressed with your skill. Little does Enaldinho know that I developed a technique to get whatever I need from these machines here. Oh, I ca n't believe it, I just actually completed the whole collection. It 's kind of hilarious because the machine said you had to collect all 10 dolls. But whatever, at the very least I 've now got the complete collection. Dude, what is going on? Is it just me or are those heads moving? No, no, no, Reinaldinho, it 's not just your imagination, they really are moving. It is just so incredibly sweet and precious how she keeps saying 'Mommy, Mommy' over and over again. Oh, I am feeling so incredibly proud of her right now; this is definitely the most wonderful and impressive collection I have ever created in my life. Guys, you ’ re going crazy.
